items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'shape checks so source payload matches source type exactly'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The absence of relevant evidence to confirm that the shape checks are enforced indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive result.
